title: bot: NIE_FROM sanitizer allows hyphens — pub_ids are hex-only
description: bot/src/main.rs:164-167: safe_from filter keeps chars that are alphanumeric OR '-'. PubIds are hex strings (0-9a-f), so hyphens should never appear. Allowing hyphens is harmless but creates a false sense of security: a future hook script that splits on '-' could misbehave if the pub_id format ever changes. Fix: filter to only [0-9a-fA-F] to match the actual PubId format.
